# growthbook_team (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook team by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique team identifier.

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) User ID that created the team.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `default_project` (String) Default project ID for team members.
- `description` (String) Team description.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments the global role is limited to.
- `limit_access_by_environment` (Boolean) Whether the global role is limited to specific environments.
- `managed_by_idp` (Boolean) Whether membership is managed by an IdP.
- `members` (List of String) User IDs that belong to this team.
- `name` (String) Team name.
- `project_roles` (Attributes List) Per-project role overrides for this team. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--project_roles))
- `role` (String) Global role for team members.

<a id="nestedatt--project_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `project_roles`

Read-Only:

- `environments` (List of String) Environments the override is limited to.
- `limit_access_by_environment` (Boolean) Whether the override is limited to specific environments.
- `project` (String) Project ID the role override applies to.
- `role` (String) Role granted within the project.
- `teams` (List of String) Nested team IDs associated with this project role.
